tests.test_name: Recommendations renders and JSON is complete for QA Manager
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager using the Recommendations add-on receives a complete, well-structured output with actionable recommendations both in the display panel and in the downloaded JSON.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Recommendations add-on produces visible output after analyzing a BDD test file for a QA Manager

test_coverage.verification_step: "Recommended Actions" appears exactly once in the output
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The recommendations section is rendered without duplication in the displayed results

test_coverage.verification_step: Downloaded JSON has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The exported JSON is fully populated with no placeholder or missing content
The JSON structure follows the expected schema with a dedicated recommendations section
At least one actionable recommendation is generated and included in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: "actions" key appears exactly once in the "recommendations" section
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The JSON structure is clean with no duplicate keys causing data integrity issues
